sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1149" key="a)damnh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδαμ-νής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄδαμ-νος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1149.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀδάμαστος</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
